root_cause: server/index.ts line 115 returns { jobId, position } from POST /api/spawn. cli/srm.ts line 328 parsed the response as { processId }, so processId was undefined in production. Log filtering silently matched no messages and the metadata fetch hit /api/jobs/undefined. The test mock in cli/srm.test.ts line 295 returned { processId } to match the client's expectation rather than the real server response, masking the bug.
prevention_rule: When writing a test mock for an HTTP endpoint, always copy the exact response shape from the real server handler (res.json(...) call). Never write the mock to match what the client expects — match what the server sends. Cross-reference field names between the server handler and client parse before the first commit.
